discovery_keys.h(3) Library Functions Manual discovery_keys.h(3)

NAME

discovery_keys.h - Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER_HOSTNAME
Official ACDS server hostname (automatic HTTPS key trust). #define ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL 'https://discovery.ascii-chat.com/key.pub'
Default HTTPS URLs for official ACDS keys. #define ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL 'https://discovery.ascii-chat.com/key.gpg'
#define ACDS_KEYS_CACHE_DIR 'acds_keys'
Key cache directory (relative to config dir).

Functions


asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify (const char *acds_server, const char *key_spec, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
Verify and load ACDS server public key. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_download_https (const char *url, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
Download key from HTTPS URL. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_file (const char *file_path, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
Load key from local file. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const char *acds_server, char *path_out, size_t path_size)
Get cached key path for ACDS server. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_cached (const char *acds_server, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
Check if cached key exists and load it. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_save_cached (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t pubkey[32])
Save key to cache. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify_change (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t new_pubkey[32])
Verify key change with user. asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char *acds_server)
Clear cached key for ACDS server.

Detailed Description

Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management.

This module handles verification and trust management for ACDS server public keys. It provides functionality to:

  • Download keys from HTTPS URLs using lib/crypto/http_client.h
  • Load keys from local files (SSH/GPG formats)
  • Special-case automatic trust for discovery-service.ascii-chat.com
  • Cache keys locally and detect changes (requires user verification)
  • Parse github:user and gitlab:user.gpg key specifications

Trust Model

Official ACDS Server (discovery-service.ascii-chat.com):

  • Automatically trusts keys downloaded from https://discovery-service.ascii-chat.com/key.pub or /key.gpg
  • First connection: downloads and caches key
  • Subsequent connections: uses cached key
  • Key changes: requires user verification (prevents MITM attacks)

Third-Party ACDS Servers:

  • Requires explicit --discovery-service-key configuration
  • Can be HTTPS URL, local file path, or github:user/gitlab:user specification
  • Keys are cached after first successful download/verification
  • Key changes require user verification

Usage

// Download and verify key from HTTPS URL
uint8_t pubkey[32];
asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_verify("acds.example.com",


                                            "https://acds.example.com/key.pub",


                                            pubkey);
// Automatic trust for official server
result = discovery_keys_verify("discovery-service.ascii-chat.com", NULL, pubkey);
// Load from local file
result = discovery_keys_verify("acds.example.com", "/path/to/key.pub", pubkey);
// GitHub key
result = discovery_keys_verify("acds.example.com", "github:zfogg", pubkey);

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char * acds_server)

Clear cached key for ACDS server. Removes the cached key for the given ACDS server. Useful for testing or forcing key re-download.

Parameters

Acds_server ACDS server hostname

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise

Definition at line 209 of file discovery_keys.c.

209                                                                       {
210   if (!acds_server) {
211     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_clear_cache");
212   }
213 
214   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
215   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
216   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
217     return result;
218   }
219 
220   if (platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
221     if (remove(cache_path) != 0) {
222       return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to delete cached key: %s", cache_path);
223     }
224     log_debug("Cleared cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
225   }
226 
227   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
228 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    discovery_keys_get_cache_path(), ERROR_FILE_OPERATION,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, log_debug,
    platform_is_regular_file(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH,
    SET_ERRNO, and SET_ERRNO_SYS.






asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_download_https (const
  char * url, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Download key from HTTPS URL. Downloads a public key from an HTTPS
    URL using lib/crypto/http_client.h. Supports both SSH (OpenSSH format) and
    GPG (ASCII-armored or binary) keys.




Parameters


url HTTPS URL to download from


pubkey_out Ed25519 public key output (32 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 81 of file discovery_keys.c.


81                                                                                          {
82   if (!url || !pubkey_out) {
83     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_download_https");
84   }
85 
86   log_debug("Downloading ACDS key from %s", url);
87 
88   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles HTTPS URLs
89   public_key_t key;
90   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(url, &key);
91   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
92     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to download and parse ACDS key from %s", url);
93   }
94 
95   memcpy(pubkey_out, key.key, 32);
96   log_debug("Successfully downloaded and parsed ACDS key from %s", url);
97   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
98 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, public_key_t::key, log_debug,
    parse_public_key(), and SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const
  char * acds_server, char * path_out, size_t path_size)


Get cached key path for ACDS server. Returns the local cache path
    for a given ACDS server's key. Path:
    ~/.config/ascii-chat/acds_keys/<hostname>/key.pub




Parameters


Acds_server ACDS server
  hostname


path_out Output buffer for cache path


path_size Size of output buffer


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 123 of file discovery_keys.c.


123                                                                                                            {
124   if (!acds_server || !path_out || path_size == 0) {
125     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_get_cache_path");
126   }
127 
128   char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
129   if (!config_dir) {
130     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to get config directory");
131   }
132 
133   // Path: ~/.config/ascii-chat/acds_keys/<hostname>/key.pub
134   safe_snprintf(path_out, path_size, "%s" ACDS_KEYS_CACHE_DIR PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "%s" PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "key.pub",
135                 config_dir, acds_server);
136   SAFE_FREE(config_dir);
137 
138   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
139 }






References ACDS_KEYS_CACHE_DIR, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    ERROR_CONFIG, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, get_config_dir(),
    PATH_SEPARATOR_STR, SAFE_FREE, safe_snprintf(), and
    SET_ERRNO.

    discovery_keys_load_cached(), and
    discovery_keys_save_cached().






asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_cached (const char *
  acds_server, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Check if cached key exists and load it. Attempts to load a cached
    key for the given ACDS server.




Parameters


Acds_server ACDS server
  hostname


pubkey_out Ed25519 public key output (32 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if cached key exists and loaded
  successfully, error otherwise


Definition at line 141 of file discovery_keys.c.


141                                                                                               {
142   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
143     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_cached");
144   }
145 
146   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
147   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
148   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
149     return result;
150   }
151 
152   // Check if cached key exists
153   if (!platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
154     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND, "No cached key for ACDS server: %s", acds_server);
155   }
156 
157   // Load cached key using existing infrastructure
158   return discovery_keys_load_file(cache_path, pubkey_out);
159 }

asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_file (const char *
  file_path, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Load key from local file. Loads a public key from a local file.
    Supports:


    
  
  • OpenSSH format (.pub files)
    • 
  
  • GPG ASCII-armored format (.asc, .gpg)
    • 
  
  • GPG binary format
    • 



Parameters


file_path Path to key file


pubkey_out Ed25519 public key output (32 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 100 of file discovery_keys.c.


100                                                                                           {
101   if (!file_path || !pubkey_out) {
102     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_file");
103   }
104 
105   log_debug("Loading ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);
106 
107   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles file paths
108   public_key_t key;
109   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(file_path, &key);
110   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
111     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to load ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);
112   }
113 
114   memcpy(pubkey_out, key.key, 32);
115   log_debug("Successfully loaded ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);
116   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
117 }

asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_save_cached (const char *
  acds_server, const uint8_t pubkey[32])


Save key to cache. Caches a public key for the given ACDS
  server.




Parameters


Acds_server ACDS server
  hostname


pubkey Public key to cache (32 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 161 of file discovery_keys.c.


161                                                                                                 {
162   if (!acds_server || !pubkey) {
163     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_save_cached");
164   }
165 
166   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
167   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
168   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
169     return result;
170   }
171 
172   // Create cache directory if it doesn't exist
173   char dir_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
174   safe_snprintf(dir_path, sizeof(dir_path), "%s", cache_path);
175 
176   // Find the last path separator (handle both / and \ for cross-platform compatibility)
177   char *last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '\\');
178   if (!last_sep) {
179     last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '/');
180   }
181 
182   if (last_sep) {
183     *last_sep = '\0';
184     if (!platform_is_directory(dir_path)) {
185       asciichat_error_t result = platform_mkdir(dir_path, 0700);
186       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
187         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create ACDS key cache directory: %s", dir_path);
188       }
189     }
190   }
191 
192   // Save key in OpenSSH public key format
193   FILE *f = platform_fopen("file_stream", cache_path, "w");
194   if (!f) {
195     return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create cache file: %s", cache_path);
196   }
197 
198   // Convert binary Ed25519 key to base64 for OpenSSH format
199   char base64_key[128];
200   sodium_bin2base64(base64_key, sizeof(base64_key), pubkey, 32, sodium_base64_VARIANT_ORIGINAL);
201 
202   fprintf(f, "ssh-ed25519 %s acds-cached-key\n", base64_key);
203   fclose(f);
204 
205   log_debug("Cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
206   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
207 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    discovery_keys_get_cache_path(), ERROR_FILE_OPERATION,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, log_debug, platform_fopen(),
    platform_is_directory(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH,
    platform_mkdir(), safe_snprintf(), SET_ERRNO, and
    SET_ERRNO_SYS.


Referenced by discovery_keys_verify().






asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify (const char *
  acds_server, const char * key_spec, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Verify and load ACDS server public key. This function handles all
    ACDS key verification scenarios:




Automatic Trust (discovery-service.ascii-chat.com
  only):



  
•

  
If acds_server == "discovery-service.ascii-chat.com" and
      key_spec == NULL:





  
 •

  
Downloads from ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL or ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL

  
 •

  
Caches key locally

  
 •

  
Trusts without user verification (first time)

  
 •

  
Requires user verification if key changes




Explicit Key Specification:


    
  
  • HTTPS URL: Downloads key from URL, caches it
    • 
  
  • Local file: Loads key from file path
    • 
  
  • github:user: Fetches SSH or GPG key from GitHub
    • 
  
  • gitlab:user.gpg: Fetches GPG key from GitLab
    • 



Caching Behavior:


    
  
  • Keys are cached in ~/.config/ascii-chat/acds_keys/<hostname>/
    • 
  
  • Cache invalidation requires user confirmation (prevents MITM attacks)
    • 



Parameters


Acds_server ACDS server hostname
  (e.g., "acds.example.com")


key_spec Key specification:

    
  
  • NULL: automatic trust for discovery-service.ascii-chat.com only
    • 
  
  • HTTPS URL: https://example.com/key.pub
    • 
  
  • File path: /path/to/key.pub or ~/.ssh/server.pub
    • 
  
  • GitHub: github:username
    • 
  
  • GitLab: gitlab:username.gpg
    • 



pubkey_out Ed25519 public key output (32 bytes)




Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 277 of file discovery_keys.c.


277                                                                                                                {
278   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
279     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify");
280   }
281 
282   uint8_t new_pubkey[32];
283   asciichat_error_t result;
284   bool is_official = is_official_server(acds_server);
285 
286   // ===========================================================================
287   // Step 1: Obtain the public key
288   // ===========================================================================
289 
290   if (!key_spec && is_official) {
291     // Automatic trust for official server: try SSH key first, then GPG
292     log_info("Attempting automatic HTTPS key trust for official ACDS server");
293 
294     public_key_t key;
295     result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL, &key);
296     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
297       log_debug("SSH key download failed, trying GPG key");
298       result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL, &key);
299     }
300 
301     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
302       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to download key from official ACDS server");
303     }
304 
305     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
306 
307   } else if (!key_spec) {
308     // No key_spec and not official server = error
309     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
310                      "Third-party ACDS servers require explicit --discovery-service-key configuration."
311                      "Only %s has automatic trust.",
312                      ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER);
313 
314   } else {
315     // Use parse_public_key for all other cases (handles HTTPS, files, github:, gitlab:, etc.)
316     public_key_t key;
317     result = parse_public_key(key_spec, &key);
318     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
319       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to load/download ACDS key from: %s", key_spec);
320     }
321 
322     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
323   }
324 
325   // ===========================================================================
326   // Step 2: Check cache and handle key changes
327   // ===========================================================================
328 
329   uint8_t cached_pubkey[32];
330   result = discovery_keys_load_cached(acds_server, cached_pubkey);
331 
332   if (result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
333     // Cached key exists - compare
334     if (memcmp(cached_pubkey, new_pubkey, 32) != 0) {
335       // Key changed - require user verification
336       result = discovery_keys_verify_change(acds_server, cached_pubkey, new_pubkey);
337       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
338         return result; // User rejected or error
339       }
340 
341       // User accepted - update cache
342       result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
343       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
344         log_warn("Failed to update cached key, continuing anyway");
345       }
346     } else {
347       log_debug("ACDS key matches cached key for: %s", acds_server);
348     }
349 
350   } else {
351     // No cached key - save it for next time
352     log_info("First connection to ACDS server: %s, caching key", acds_server);
353     result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
354     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
355       log_warn("Failed to cache key, continuing anyway");
356     }
357   }
358 
359   // ===========================================================================
360   // Step 3: Return verified key
361   // ===========================================================================
362 
363   memcpy(pubkey_out, new_pubkey, 32);
364   log_debug("ACDS key verification successful for: %s", acds_server);
365   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
366 }






References ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL,
    ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL, ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, discovery_keys_load_cached(),
    discovery_keys_save_cached(), discovery_keys_verify_change(),
    ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK,
    public_key_t::key, log_debug, log_info,
    log_warn, parse_public_key(), and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by client_crypto_init().






asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify_change (const char
  * acds_server, const uint8_t old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t
  new_pubkey[32])


Verify key change with user. When a cached key doesn't match the
    newly downloaded/loaded key, prompts the user to verify the change.




Displays:


    
  
  • Old key fingerprint (SHA256)
    • 
  
  • New key fingerprint (SHA256)
    • 
  
  • Warning about potential MITM attack
    • 
  
  • Prompt: "Accept new key? (y/N): "
    • 



Parameters


Acds_server ACDS server
  hostname


old_pubkey Previous cached key (32 bytes)


new_pubkey New downloaded key (32 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if user accepts, ERROR_USER_REJECTED if
  declined


Definition at line 234 of file discovery_keys.c.


235                                                                              {
236   if (!acds_server || !old_pubkey || !new_pubkey) {
237     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify_change");
238   }
239 
240   char old_fingerprint[65], new_fingerprint[65];
241   compute_key_fingerprint(old_pubkey, old_fingerprint);
242   compute_key_fingerprint(new_pubkey, new_fingerprint);
243 
244   const char *warning_msg =
245     "\n"
246     "⚠️  WARNING: ACDS SERVER KEY HAS CHANGED\n"
247     "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
248     "Server: %s\n"
249     "\n"
250     "Old key (SHA256): %s\n"
251     "New key (SHA256): %s\n"
252     "\n"
253     "This could indicate:\n"
254     "  1. The server operator rotated their key\n"
255     "  2. A man-in-the-middle attack is in progress\n"
256     "\n"
257     "Verify the new key fingerprint with the server operator before accepting.\n"
258     "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n";
259 
260   // Log to both stderr (via log_warn) and file log
261   log_warn(warning_msg, acds_server, old_fingerprint, new_fingerprint);
262 
263   // Ask user to confirm
264   bool accepted = platform_prompt_yes_no("Accept new ACDS server key", false);
265   if (!accepted) {
266     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "User rejected ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
267   }
268 
269   log_info("User accepted ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
270   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
271 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, compute_key_fingerprint(),
    ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    log_info, log_warn, platform_prompt_yes_no(), and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by discovery_keys_verify().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.13
    ascii-chat
